subject: Deino, a small dark-blue dragon Pokemon with a large head covered in thick fur obscuring its eyes, crouching among colorful flowers
description: A small compact dragon-type creature rendered in dark navy blue with a disproportionately large head. A thick curtain of dark fur covers what would be the eye area, giving the creature a blind or shrouded appearance. The figure crouches low to the ground surrounded by vivid red and pink flowers with lush green foliage. The contrast between the dark creature and the bright floral background is visually striking. No wings are visible; the body is low-slung and somewhat formless beneath the large fur-draped head.
foreground: Small dark-blue dragon creature with fur-covered head crouching in a flower bed
background: Bright flower garden with vivid red and pink blooms and green foliage
emotion: lurking, searching — blind creature in a bright environment suggests unease and contrast
